title: Curriculum Developer Vacancy at IIT Madras International Enterprises - 2026 Batch

jsonLd.title: Curriculum Developer Vacancy at IIT Madras International Enterprises - 2026 Batch
jsonLd.description:
IIT Madras International Enterprises, one of India's leading organizations, is hiring a Curriculum Developer for our Varanasi operations. We offer a competitive salary package along with world-class benefits.

About IIT Madras International Enterprises:
IIT Madras International Enterprises is a leading organization in the Hybrid sector, committed to excellence, innovation, and employee growth. We offer a dynamic work environment where talent is recognized and rewarded.

Key Responsibilities:
• Conduct doubt-clearing sessions and remedial classes for weak students
• Design formative and summative assessments aligned to learning objectives
• Develop and deliver engaging lesson plans for students
• Create curriculum-aligned learning materials and assessments
• Maintain classroom discipline and create a positive learning environment
• Utilize technology and digital tools to enhance learning outcomes
• Contribute to school newsletter, blogs, and other publications

Required Skills & Qualifications:
• B.Arch / M.Arch from recognized institution
• 0-1 years of relevant experience
• Proficiency in IB Curriculum
• Proficiency in Curriculum Development
• Proficiency in Data Analysis
• Proficiency in Student Assessment
• Proficiency in Research Skills
• Proficiency in Special Education
• Proficiency in MS Office
• Proficiency in CBSE/ICSE Standards

Work Mode: Hybrid - Flexible work-from-home and office

What We Offer:
• Competitive salary with performance-linked incentives
• Comprehensive health insurance for self and family
• Modern office with recreational facilities
• Work-from-home flexibility
• Annual performance appraisal
• Recognition and rewards programs
• Salary Range: 2.5 LPA - 6 LPA per annum

Location: Varanasi, Uttar Pradesh, India

If you are excited about this opportunity, apply now and take the next step in your career journey with IIT Madras International Enterprises!
